data.content:
Branch: worktree-foolery-8202-debian-service
Commit: 1bd2263d

Added `docs/debian-systemd-service.md`: a standalone guide for running
Foolery as a user-level systemd service on Debian. Covers writing the
`foolery.service` unit, install/start/enable with `systemctl`, verifying
the bind address with `ss -ltnp`, day-to-day systemctl commands, and
common troubleshooting.

The doc explicitly recommends a Tailscale IP (preferred) or LAN IP for
`FOOLERY_HOST`, and calls out that `0.0.0.0` is not recommended because
Foolery has no built-in auth.

Also added a one-line index entry in `docs/README.md`.

Doc-only change. `bun run lint`, `bun x tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`
(2761 passed / 268 files), and `bun run build` all pass.
